sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.description: Searches Medtric warranty policies using AI Search RAG retrieval with semantic search against the Medtric Warranty Policies knowledge base. Returns relevant KB articles with number, title, and content. Use 1-2 keywords from the claim reason.
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.inputs: [{"name":"search_query","description":"Search query for warranty policy lookup. Use keywords from the claim reason (e.g., 'physical damage dropped', 'battery failure', 'screen defect', 'warranty expired')","mandatory":true}]
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.name: Search Warranty Policy Knowledge Base

sys_update_version.name: sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m_dfeee650689046748a1c849811400ddf
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m"> <sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <sys_id>dfeee650689046748a1c849811400ddf</sys_id> <sys_scope display_value="x_snc_medwc_auto_0">2c25847dc365875409e6d063e4013179</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m_dfeee650689046748a1c849811400ddf</sys_update_name> <active>true</active> <agent>f4caf00dad744168941f9b55478451ea</agent> <description>Searches Medtric warranty policies using AI Search RAG retrieval with semantic search against the Medtric Warranty Policies knowledge base. Returns relevant KB articles with number, title, and content. Use 1-2 keywords from the claim reason.</description> <display_output>false</display_output> <document_status/> <execution_mode>autopilot</execution_mode> <inputs>[{"name":"search_query","description":"Search query for warranty policy lookup. Use keywords from the claim reason (e.g., 'physical damage dropped', 'battery failure', 'screen defect', 'warranty expired')","mandatory":true}]</inputs> <max_auto_executions>10</max_auto_executions> <name>Search Warranty Policy Knowledge Base</name> <output_transformation_strategy>none</output_transformation_strategy> <post_message>Policy review complete.</post_message> <post_processing_script/> <pre_message>Checking warranty policies...</pre_message> <pre_run>false</pre_run> <sys_domain>global</sys_domain> <sys_overrides/> <timeout/> <tool>23aaa24c5b44475db4e2c38809353bc3</tool> <tool_attributes>{}</tool_attributes> <transformation_instructions/> <widgets/> </sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m> </record_update>
